description: Ablation study on population size per island

results.notes: Small population - faster per-generation but lower final quality
Default population - good balance of quality and efficiency
Large population - best quality but 2x computational cost

conclusion: Larger populations improve solution quality but at linear computational cost. 100 provides best quality/cost tradeoff.

efficiency_analysis.recommendation: Use population=100 for efficiency; population=200 if computational budget allows
